metadata.title: Mantus Online
metadata.description: Enter the world of Mantus Online.

languages.label: Language
languages.saveFailed: Language could not be saved. Please try again.

configuration.supabase: Authentication is not configured. Add the Supabase URL and anonymous key to client/.env.local.

auth.enterWorld: Sign in to enter the world
auth.confirmationNotice: Check your email to confirm your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in method is currently unavailable.

characters.empty: No characters yet. Create your first hero to enter the world.
characters.name: Character Name
characters.nameRules: Letters and spaces only, starting with a letter

Knight.name: Knight
Knight.description: Stalwart front-line fighter with heavy armour and melee mastery.

Paladin.name: Paladin
Paladin.description: Versatile ranged hunter armed with bows, spears, and holy magic.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
Sorcerer.description: Fragile master of raw destructive magic and summoning.

Druid.name: Druid
Druid.description: Healer and nature mage wielding ice and life-saving support.

hud.controls: WASD to move · I for inventory · Esc for menu

menu.title: Game Menu
menu.returnHint: Press Esc to return to the game

settings.title: Settings
settings.previewNotice: Volume and hotkeys are preview-only until their settings persistence is connected.

hotkeys.title: Hotkey Mapping
hotkeys.previewNotice: These mappings are local to this preview and do not change runtime controls yet.

serverErrors.already-joined: This character has already entered the world.
serverErrors.auth-failed: The game server could not authenticate this session.
serverErrors.auth-required: Sign in before performing this action.
serverErrors.character-limit-reached: All character slots are already used.
serverErrors.character-list-failed: Your characters could not be loaded. Please reconnect and try again.
serverErrors.character-load-failed: That character could not enter the world. Please try again.
serverErrors.character-name-invalid: Use 3–20 letters with single spaces, and avoid reserved staff names.
serverErrors.character-name-taken: A character with that name already exists.
serverErrors.character-not-found: That character does not belong to this account.
serverErrors.character-operation-pending: Wait for the current character request to finish.
serverErrors.invalid-message: The game server rejected an invalid request.
serverErrors.join-required: Enter the world before performing this action.
serverErrors.language-update-failed: Language could not be saved. Please try again.
serverErrors.language-update-pending: A language update is already in progress.
serverErrors.logged-in-elsewhere: This account signed in from another connection.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many requests were sent. Please reconnect.
serverErrors.world-full: The game world is currently full.
serverErrors.unknown: The game server returned an unexpected error.
